meaning: adj.早朝,为特定的人举行的招待会,堤vt.筑堤
examples: This relationship is an important one for understanding the ancestry and relations of the Levantine populations of the Upper Pleistocene.
Tel Ilan is quite simply the most enchanting village in this entire Levantine country.
At times, as I struggled to find the right windsurfer's balance in the Levantine wind, I could squint my eyes and almost imagine I was in eastern Oregon.
